Facings.source: Merged from ASME_B16_5_FlangeFacings_Compact.xml, Flanges.xml and Gaskets.xml

Rating.note: E missing in source; S6 inferred
Seating dims absent; gasket approx S1 (B unspecified)

RingJointFacing.note: P values inferred from the B16.47 large-diameter groove alignment already used in this merged facing table; official RTJ ring assignments above NPS 36 are not present in the repo source.
